On November 5, 1556, the incredibly massive, fiercely definitive, and absolutely historic Second Battle of Panipat was aggressively fought. The massive Mughal forces, heavily commanded by the incredibly brilliant general Bairam Khan representing the young Emperor Akbar, aggressively and violently clashed with the massive, heavily armed forces of the Hindu king Hemu. The incredibly massive Mughal victory absolutely and permanently crushed the resurgent Afghan-Hindu alliance, firmly and aggressively re-establishing absolute, undeniable Mughal imperial dominance across the massive northern Indian subcontinent.

On November 5, 1870, Chittaranjan Das, universally and massively revered as "Deshbandhu" (Friend of the Nation), was officially born in Calcutta. A massive, brilliant lawyer and incredibly formidable political leader, he aggressively defended Aurobindo Ghosh in the massive Alipore Bomb Case. He heavily founded the Swaraj Party alongside Motilal Nehru, fiercely advocating for absolute self-government and aggressive, massive entry into the legislative councils to heavily disrupt the deeply oppressive British colonial administration from within.
